name: brothel-parlor
summary: The front parlor of a high-end brothel. Plush seating, low tables with wine, a madam's desk, a curtained stair to private rooms. More salon than transaction.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: rectangle with desk at entry, lounge area deeper

primary_palette.note: classic parlor — madam's desk, lounge, fire

story_prompts: evening gathering — patrons arriving, wine poured, madam greeting at the desk
private audience — a political figure in the corner with a courtesan, guards excluded
blackmail exchange — a letter being handed over at the curtain
quiet morning — staff cleaning, madam reviewing the ledger

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: warm intimate light (0.4) — candle and firelight dominant

anti_patterns: avoid anything crude — this is the refined version, atmosphere is soft
stair to private rooms goes behind a curtain or alcove — never front-and-center
madam's desk faces the door — she controls access
